## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` — all tests pass
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings` — no new warnings
- [ ] `brief check examples/01-hello.brief` — still passes
- [ ] New/changed `.brief` files are formatted with `brief fmt --write`
- [ ] New error codes have a `fix:` hint and a test in `checker.rs`
- [ ] New examples are numbered sequentially and listed in `examples/README.md`
